title: Filipino-Style Bacon Cheese Quesadilla
description: A twist on the classic quesadilla, this recipe combines the savory flavors of Filipino cuisine with the comfort of melted cheese and crispy bacon.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Cook the bacon until crispy. Set aside.
In the same skillet, add the patis and cook for 1 minute.
Place a large flour tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Add a few slices of crispy bacon on top of the cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also crispy and the cheese is melted.
Cut into wedges and serve immediately.
